context7.description: Library documentation lookup. Append 'use context7' to prompts for real-time doc search.

playwright.description: Browser automation via accessibility-tree snapshots. 10-100x faster than screenshot-based tools.

github.description: GitHub API: PRs, issues, repos, actions. 51 tools.

serena.description: LSP-based code indexing and semantic editing across 30+ languages.

deepwiki.description: Whole-repository Q&A. Free, no auth. Tools: ask_question, read_wiki_structure, read_wiki_contents.

memory.description: Local JSON knowledge graph for entities, relations, and observations.

sentry.description: Sentry error monitoring: issue search, event details, performance triage.

posthog.description: PostHog analytics: feature flags, events, funnels, error investigation.

exa.description: Web search optimized for developer queries. Structured results with citations.

supabase.description: Supabase: database, auth, storage, edge functions. DEV/STAGING ONLY - never connect to production.

filesystem.description: Filesystem operations with sandboxed access to the project directory.

container-use.description: Dagger container isolation: each agent gets a fresh container + git branch. Use 'cu watch' for audit log.

circleci.description: CircleCI: validate configs, trigger builds, fetch logs, analyze flaky tests.

linear.description: Linear project management: issues, projects, cycles, teams.
